reasoning: The control requires detection and monitoring of configuration changes and vulnerabilities. In Kubernetes, this can be addressed through audit logging for configuration changes, admission controllers for vulnerability scanning on resource creation, image scanning for vulnerabilities, and monitoring network policies for unauthorized changes.
title: CC7.1 To meet its objectives, the entity uses detection and monitoring procedures to identify (1) changes to configurations that result in the introduction of new vulnerabilities, and (2) susceptibilities to newly discovered vulnerabilities
